title: Creating PAC (Phase-Amplitude Coupling) graphs using EEGlab.
author: Kim, Ho Jeong
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0

steps.instruction: The first protocol involves processing data generated using open-Ephy by creating a timeline based on the stimulation points (epochs). In other words, if there are 600 epochs, the code establishes a timeline based on these epochs. The second protocol, on the other hand, involves dividing the x (phase), y (amplitude), and z (time) graphs generated in the first protocol into desired segments, averaging them, and visualizing the results.
